message:
fix(node): correct push_bounded ordering in 2 missed files

The commit 0c2d9dc fixed push_bounded ordering across 59 modules but
missed optimization_governor.rs and evidence_replay_gate.rs which still
had the old check-then-push pattern. Changed to push-then-drain to match
the canonical implementation used everywhere else.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
